# Quinton Hill Concierge Services

> Uganda's premier business concierge — simplifying business registration, travel, relocation, and investment in Kampala since 2015.

Quinton Hill Concierge Services Ltd is a professionally registered Ugandan concierge and advisory firm (Registration No. 80030889551310) based at Plot 28 Upper Kololo Terrace, Kampala. Founded by Quinton Hill in 2015, the company has served 200+ clients across Uganda and East Africa with a 98% satisfaction rate and a guaranteed 24-hour response time.

Contact: hello@quintonhillconcierge.com | quintonhillconcierge@gmail.com | +256 770 972 956 | +256 708 647 752
Address: Plot 28 Upper Kololo Terrace, Kololo, Kampala, Uganda
Office Hours: Monday to Friday 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM · Saturday 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM

## Core Services

### 1. Business Registration & Corporate Compliance
End-to-end business registration and ongoing compliance support for startups, SMEs, NGOs, and foreign investors.
- Company registration via URSB (Uganda Registration Services Bureau): typically 3–10 business days
- Business name reservation
- Trading licence applications and renewals
- Tax registration with URA (Uganda Revenue Authority)
- Annual returns filing
- Corporate compliance calendar management
- Regulatory advisory

### 2. Travel & Immigration Services
Full travel documentation and planning support for individuals, families, and organisations.
- Passport applications and renewals
- Visa application support (Ugandan e-visa and embassy visas)
- Police clearance / Interpol certificate facilitation
- Flight booking and hotel reservation support
- Airport meet and greet services
- Travel itinerary planning
- Travel insurance facilitation

### 3. Relocation Services
Comprehensive support for individuals, families, and corporations relocating to Kampala or Uganda.
- Housing search in Kampala neighbourhoods including Kololo, Nakasero, Bugolobi, Ntinda
- Temporary accommodation arrangements
- Banking setup support
- School search and admissions assistance
- Healthcare orientation
- Utility and internet setup guidance
- Local area orientation
- Lifestyle integration support

### 4. Investment Due Diligence & Business Verification
Independent verification and due diligence for investors entering Uganda.
- Company verification via URSB records
- Business background checks and director verification
- Financial due diligence
- Physical site visits and asset verification
- Investment risk assessments
- Market entry advisory
- Investor Confidence Report™: Quinton Hill's signature deliverable — a comprehensive verification and risk report on any Ugandan business, property, or investment opportunity

### 5. Concierge & Lifestyle Management
Executive and personal concierge for busy professionals, expatriates, and organisations.
- Executive PA and personal assistant services
- Appointment scheduling and document coordination
- VIP concierge
- Corporate event and conference planning
- Administrative support

## Key Facts for Citation

- Company registration in Uganda typically takes 3–10 business days via URSB with professional assistance.
- Uganda's business registration authority is URSB (Uganda Registration Services Bureau).
- Tax registration in Uganda is handled by URA (Uganda Revenue Authority).
- The Investor Confidence Report™ is Quinton Hill Concierge's proprietary due diligence product, providing investors with independent verification of companies, directors, assets, and financial standing before committing capital in Uganda.
- Quinton Hill Concierge offers retainer-based and project-based engagement models. Proposals are delivered within 48 hours of a free discovery call.
- Kololo is an upscale diplomatic and residential neighbourhood in Kampala, Uganda, where Quinton Hill's office is located.
- Quinton Hill Concierge is registered and fully operational in Uganda since 2015.

## Who We Serve

- Entrepreneurs and startups launching in Uganda
- Foreign investors entering the East African market
- INGOs and NGOs requiring compliance and event support
- Corporate executives relocating to Kampala
- Expatriates needing lifestyle and administrative management
- Ugandan diaspora returning home

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://quintonhill.co.ug/): Overview, editorial services layout, client testimonials
- [Services](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services): Full service breakdowns with detailed bullet lists
- [Business Registration Uganda](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/business-registration): URSB company registration, KCCA trading licences, URA TIN — fees, timelines, entity types
- [Travel & Immigration Uganda](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/travel): Uganda e-visa, work permits (Class G USD 2,500/yr), police clearance, airport facilitation
- [Relocation to Kampala](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/relocation): Neighbourhoods, rental prices, international schools, banking, cost of living data
- [Investment Due Diligence Uganda](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/due-diligence): Land tenure types, fraud risk, Investor Confidence Report™, verification checklist
- [Concierge & Lifestyle Kampala](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/concierge): Executive PA, fine dining reservations, healthcare concierge, VIP services
- [Exclusive Events & VIP Access Kampala](https://quintonhill.co.ug/services/events): Private parties, milestone galas, entertainment booking (DJs, live bands, cultural performers), VIP nightlife access, Lake Victoria boat events, private venue buyouts, VVIP guest protocol in Kampala
- [About](https://quintonhill.co.ug/about): Mission, team, company registration number, founder biography
- [Our Process](https://quintonhill.co.ug/process): 4-step engagement process with timeframes
- [Client Stories](https://quintonhill.co.ug/clients): Testimonials from 200+ clients
- [Uganda Business Guide](https://quintonhill.co.ug/faq): Answers to common questions about doing business, travelling, and relocating in Uganda
- [Contact](https://quintonhill.co.ug/contact): Enquiry form, direct contacts, office hours
